basic_details.job_title: Secondary Health Hospital Krishna Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 19 Civil Assistant Surgeon Specialist / Civil Assistant Surgeon Posts
basic_details.post_name: Civil Assistant Surgeon Specialist / Civil Assistant Surgeon (General)
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSSSC CGL 12256 Group B & Group C Online Form 202612,256 Posts • Group B & Group C • SSC22 Jun 202612,256 postsRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Vacancies • Technician29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Openings • OSSSC13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsCentral Bank of India 4,500 Apprentice Recruitment 20264,500 Vacancies • Apprentice • Central Bank of India22 Jun 20264,500 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Openings • Conductor05 Jul 20264,318 posts

age_limit.age_details: OC: 42 years, EWS/SC/ST/BC: 47 years, Differently abled: 52 years as on 01.07.2026. Ex-servicemen: 3 years relaxation.
age_limit.details: OC: 42 years as on 01.07.2026 EWS/SC/ST/BC: 47 years as on 01.07.2026 Differently abled: 52 years as on 01.07.2026 Ex-servicemen: 03 years from his age in addition to the length of service rendered by him in the armed forces

qualification.education_qualification: PG Degree/DNB/Diploma in the particular specialty or MBBS, registered with AP Medical Council.
qualification.details: Civil Assistant Surgeon Specialist: PG Degree / DNB / Diploma in the particular specialty or its equivalent qualification included in the schedule - I & II of the MCI Act, 1956. Registered in A.P. Medical Council with current validity. Civil Assistant Surgeon (General): MBBS or its equivalent qualification included in the schedule - I & II of the MCI Act, 1956. Registered in A.P. Medical Council with current validity.

salary_details.pay_scale: CAS Specialist: Rs. 1,10,000/-, CAS General: Rs. 61,960/-

selection_process: Selection will be based on merit and rule of reservation Merit list will be prepared for all the candidates who applied and fulfilled all the eligibility conditions. Selection lists will be prepared based on merit lists and Rule of Reservation issued in AP State and Subordinate Services.

all_official_links.label: Download Secondary Health Hospital Krishna Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for Secondary Health Hospital Krishna Recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 18th June 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on this date with all required documents.

faq.question: Q2. What are the total number of vacancies released by Secondary Health Hospital Krishna?
faq.answer: Secondary Health Hospital Krishna has announced a total of 19 vacancies for the posts of Civil Assistant Surgeon Specialist and Civil Assistant Surgeon (General).

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Civil Assistant Surgeon (General) post?
faq.answer: For the Civil Assistant Surgeon (General) post, candidates must possess an MBBS degree or its equivalent qualification and be registered with the AP Medical Council.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Civil Assistant Surgeon Specialist post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Civil Assistant Surgeon Specialist post will receive a salary of Rs. 1,10,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the OC category candidates applying for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for OC category candidates is 42 years as on 01.07.2026. Age relaxation is applicable for other categories.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the Office of the District Coordinator of Hospital Services, Krishna (DCHS Office), Government General Hospital, Machilipatnam, Premises 1st floor, Cantonment, Machilipatnam.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: Selection will be based on merit and the rule of reservation. A merit list will be prepared, and selection lists will be based on these lists and AP State and Subordinate Services rules.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original certificates and a set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and registration certificates.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions are on a contract basis.
